basic_details.job_title: IIT Bhilai Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Bhilai (IIT Bhilai)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Bhilai (IIT Bhilai) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Project Assistant Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age Relaxation: As per Government of India rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Master’s degree in Science / Engineering / Technology with first class, 60% marks (55% for SC/ST)
qualification.details: Master’s degree in Science / Engineering / Technology with first class, 60% marks (55% for SC/ST)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Bhilai Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 27-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Bhilai Project Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Bhilai Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Bhilai Project Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Bhilai Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 27-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Bhilai Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Bhilai Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 27th July 2026. It is advisable to send your application well in advance of the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master’s degree in Science, Engineering, or Technology with a first-class division, equivalent to 60% marks. For SC/ST candidates, a minimum of 55% marks is required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Assistant post is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per the Government of India rules for eligible categories.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated pay of Rs. 25,000 per month for the Project Assistant position at IIT Bhilai.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the IIT Bhilai Project Assistant job?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply via email. You should prepare your application with all necessary documents and send it to the official email address specified in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST, Women) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Assistant position will primarily involve an interview, which may be conducted in a hybrid mode (online or offline).

faq.question: Q8. How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Assistant post in the Indian Institute of Technology Bhilai.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job offered is on a contractual basis. This means the position is for a fixed tenure, as per the project requirements.

faq.question: Q10. Where is IIT Bhilai located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Bhilai is located in Durg, Chhattisgarh, with the pincode 491002.
